descriptions.text:
Atama no Taisou (頭の体操, lit. 'Head Gymnastics') is a series of puzzle collections that were released by Kobunsha, and written by Akira Tago. As of 2010, there were 23 regular volumes with an e-book volume released.
The first volume was published in 1966 and sold more than 2.5 million copies that year. The series sold over 12 million copies and easily became a bestseller.
